text:
The department may pay from highway revenues the cost, including the administration and operation cost, of:

(1) developing, publishing, and distributing material; and

(2) maintaining and operating travel information centers.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 204. Travel Info.
##### § 204.004 — Payment of Costs

The department may pay from highway revenues the cost, including the administration and operation cost, of:

    (1) developing, publishing, and distributing material; and

    (2) maintaining and operating travel information centers.

*Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 1276, Sec. 16.001(a), eff. Sept. 1, 2003.*

subsections.text: The department may pay from highway revenues the cost, including the administration and operation cost, of:
developing, publishing, and distributing material; and
maintaining and operating travel information centers.

history.raw: Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 1276, Sec. 16.001(a), eff. Sept. 1, 2003.
